task_completion.description: User/Internet icon, CloudFront CDN, and S3 Static Assets bucket are present in the diagram, with S3 outside the VPC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for icons or shapes labeled 'User', 'Internet', 'CloudFront', and 'S3' on the EdrawMax canvas. The S3 bucket must be visibly placed outside of any VPC container.

task_completion.description: Elastic Load Balancer (ELB) and a VPC container are present in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a large container shape labeled 'VPC' and an icon/shape for 'Elastic Load Balancer' or 'ELB'.

task_completion.description: Public Subnet containing a Web Server EC2 is present inside the VPC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a container/shape labeled 'Public Subnet' located inside the VPC, which contains an icon/shape labeled 'Web Server' or 'EC2'.

task_completion.description: Private Subnet containing an App Server EC2 and RDS MySQL is present inside the VPC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a container/shape labeled 'Private Subnet' located inside the VPC, which contains icons/shapes labeled 'App Server' (or EC2) and 'RDS' (or MySQL).

task_completion.description: Directional arrows connect the components in the specified architecture flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for drawn arrows connecting the components in this exact order: Users -> CloudFront -> ELB -> Web Servers -> App Servers -> RDS. Also look for a separate arrow connecting CloudFront to S3.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as an editable .eddx file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an EdrawMax 'Save As' dialog or file explorer confirming the file is saved to '/home/ga/Diagrams/aws_architecture.eddx'.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a .png image at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an EdrawMax 'Export' dialog or file explorer confirming the image is exported to '/home/ga/Diagrams/aws_architecture.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax application window being actively used, with shapes being dragged and dropped onto the canvas, rather than a script generating the file in the background.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the diagram rather than downloading a pre-existing AWS architecture diagram from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for step-by-step construction of the diagram in EdrawMax. There should be no evidence of a web browser downloading a completed diagram image to use as a shortcut.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved and exported the files using EdrawMax's built-in save/export features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for EdrawMax 'Save' and 'Export' dialog boxes pointing to '/home/ga/Diagrams/' instead of terminal commands simply touching, renaming, or copying dummy files to bypass the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are '/home/ga/Diagrams/aws_architecture.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/aws_architecture.png'. To be considered correct, the diagram must contain at least 6 of the following keywords: VPC, Subnet, EC2, RDS, S3, CloudFront, Load Balancer, Web, App.
